title: Enovix to go public via $1.13 billion SPAC deal
text: Enovix went public via a SPAC merger that completed on July 14, 2021. The company listed on the Nasdaq Stock Market under the ticker symbol ENVX. The SPAC (Rodgers Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp.) had priced a $200 million IPO at $10 in December 2020, and $405 million in gross cash proceeds were raised. Founded in 2007, Enovix has focused on designing and manufacturing better batteries, making breakthroughs including an elegant 100% active silicon anode that marks a breakthrough in energy density. The company is headquartered in Fremont, California. Enovix designs, develops, and manufactures lithium-ion battery cells and serves wearables and IoT, smartphone, computing, electric vehicles, and original equipment manufacturers.
